name: corrupted_canopy
description: A forest where shadow has replaced sunlight. The trees bleed darkness where cut, and the wood writhes in your hands. Only the most experienced woodcutters dare work here.
note_texts: The trees here bleed shadow where cut. The wood writhes and resists the blade.
A shadow beast watches from the canopy. It does not attack — it only observes.
Old sanctum stones are visible through the twisted trunks. Something still lives there.
The corruption spreads as you work. The canopy hungers for something unnamed.
The canopy parts. The Corrupted Sanctum rises from the shadow-wood — its doors open, waiting.
unlock_message: The Corrupted Sanctum has been revealed — enter and purge the shadow within.
